info.title: Planning Center Services
info.description: Schedule your teams, manage your music, and revolutionize the way you plan your worship services.

tags.name: Folder
tags.description: A folder is a container used to organize multiple Service Types or other Folders.

tags.name: ServiceType
tags.description: A Service Type is a container for plans.

tags.name: Person
tags.description: A person added to Planning Center Services.

tags.name: Team
tags.description: A Team within a Service Type.

tags.name: AttachmentType
tags.description: Create an Attachment Type for each type of file you might want only specific people to see. When you attach a file, you can specify an attachment type to then be able to link the file to a position.

tags.name: Organization
tags.description: The root level of an organization where account-level settings are applied.

tags.name: Series
tags.description:
A Series can be specified for each plan to tie plans with similar messages together, even across Service Types.

*Note*: A series is not created until artwork is added from the plan.  You can use `series_title` included in `Plan` attributes to get titles for series without artwork.

/media/{media_id}/attachments/{attachmen.description: A file, whether it's stored on Planning Center or linked from another location.

This action is used to get the attachment file URL.  It is accessed by `POST`ing to `.../attachments/1/open`

This will generate the URL and return it in the `attachment_url` attribute of the `AttachmentActivity`.

This action is used to get a reduced resolution (preview) version of the attachment.  It is accessed by `POST`ing to `.../attachments/1/preview`

This will generate the URL and return it in the `attachment_url` attribute of the `AttachmentActivity`.

The `has_preview` attribute of an `Attachment` indicates if a preview is available. When a preview is not available this action will return a `Not Found` error with a status code of `404`.

custom_arrangement_sequence.description:
An array of strings containing a label and a number describing the section:

['Verse 1', 'Chorus 1', 'Verse 2']

service_position.description:
There are 3 possible values:

- `pre`: the item happens before the service starts

- `post`: the item happens after the service ends

- `during`: the item happens during the service

item_type.description:
There are 4 possible values:

- `song`: The item is a song

- `header`: The item is a header

- `media`: The item is a piece of media

- `item`: The default item type

This value can only be set when an item is created. The only value that you can pass is `header`. If no value is passed then `item` will be used. To create a media item you'll attach a video media to the item, and to create a song item, you'll attach a song.

alternate_keys.description:
An array of objects.

`
{
  "name": "My Alternate Key",
  "key": "B"
}
`

ending_key.description:
Possible Values:

`Ab`, `A`, `A#`, `Bb`, `B`, `C`, `C#`, `Db`, `D`, `D#`, `Eb`, `E`, `F`, `F#`, `Gb`, `G`, `G#`, `Abm`, `Am`, `A#m`, `Bbm`, `Bm`, `Cm`, `C#m`, `Dbm`, `Dm`, `D#m`, `Ebm`, `Em`, `Fm`, `F#m`, `Gbm`, `Gm`, `G#m`

To set the key to minor append `m` to the key. e.g. `Cm`

starting_key.description:
Possible Values:

`Ab`, `A`, `A#`, `Bb`, `B`, `C`, `C#`, `Db`, `D`, `D#`, `Eb`, `E`, `F`, `F#`, `Gb`, `G`, `G#`, `Abm`, `Am`, `A#m`, `Bbm`, `Bm`, `Cm`, `C#m`, `Dbm`, `Dm`, `D#m`, `Ebm`, `Em`, `Fm`, `F#m`, `Gbm`, `Gm`, `G#m`

To set the key to minor append `m` to the key. e.g. `Cm`

schedule_preference.description:
Possible Values:
  "Unavailable"
  "Every week"
  "Every other week"
  "Every 3rd week"
  "Every 4th week"
  "Every 5th week"
  "Every 6th week"
  "Once a quarter"
  "Once a month"
  "Twice a month"
  "Three times a month"
  "Choose Weeks"

preferred_weeks.description:
When `schedule_preference` is set to "Choose Weeks" then this
indicates which weeks are preferred (checked).

e.g. ['1', '3', '5'] to prefer odd numbered weeks.

Possible values are:

- service

team_reminders.description: A Hash that maps a Team ID to a reminder value. If nothing is specified, no reminder is set for that team. A reminder value is an integer (0-7) equal to the number of days before the selected time a reminder should be sent.

custom_item_types.description:
A array of hashes that maps an item title substring matcher to a color:

[{ name: "Announcements", color: "#FFFFFF" }]

Valid substring matchers are any string that could be used as an item title.

A color is the hexadecimal value of a valid color e.g. #FFFFFF
Valid colors values are #e8f6df, #e0f7ff, #e6e2fd, #ffe0e8, #ffedd1, #cfcfcf, #eaebeb, and #ffffff

standard_item_types.description:
An array of hashes that maps an item type to a color:

[{ name: "Header", color: "#FFFFFF" }]

Valid names are Header, Song, and Media.

A color is the hexadecimal value of a valid color e.g. #FFFFFF
Valid colors values are #e8f6df, #e0f7ff, #e6e2fd, #ffe0e8, #ffedd1, #cfcfcf, #eaebeb, and #ffffff

arrangement_attributes.title: Arrangement

arrangementsections_attributes.description: Sections of an Arrangement, derived from its chord chart

sections.description:
Given an arrangement with the folowing `chord_chart`:

```
VERSE 1
D          Bm       G          D
Be thou my vision O Lord of my heart
A             Bm         G              A
naught be all else to me save that Thou art
```

The value will be:

```json
[
  {
    "label": "Verse",
    "lyrics": "Be thou my vision O Lord of my heart
naught be all else to me save that Thou art",
    "breaks_at": null
  }
]
```

arrangementsections_attributes.title: ArrangementSections

attachment_attributes.description: A file, whether it's stored on Planning Center or linked from another location.

file_upload_identifier.description:
Planning Center File UUID. Required only when creating a file attachment. See the "File Uploads" section of the API documentation for more information.

Only available when requested with the `?fields` param

attachment_attributes.title: Attachment

attachmenttype_attributes.description: Create an Attachment Type for each type of file you might want only specific people to see. When you attach a file, you can specify an attachment type to then be able to link the file to a position.
attachmenttype_attributes.title: AttachmentType

blockout_attributes.description: An object representing a blockout date, and an optional recurrence pattern

repeat_frequency.description:
Possible values:

- no_repeat

- every_1

- every_2

- every_3

- every_4

- every_5

- every_6

- every_7

- every_8

repeat_interval.description:
Possible values:

- exact_day_of_month

- week_of_month_1

- week_of_month_2

- week_of_month_3

- week_of_month_4

- week_of_month_last

repeat_period.description:
Possible values:

- daily

- weekly

- monthly

- yearly

blockout_attributes.title: Blockout

blockoutdate_attributes.description: The actual dates generated by the blockout or its recurrence pattern. Generated up to a year in advance
blockoutdate_attributes.title: BlockoutDate

blockoutexception_attributes.description: A single exception for the dates generated from the blockout
blockoutexception_attributes.title: BlockoutException

group_identifiers.description: Only available when requested with the `?fields` param

my_teams.description: Only available when requested with the `?fields` param

payload.description: Only available when requested with the `?fields` param

people.description: Only available when requested with the `?fields` param

plans.description: Only available when requested with the `?fields` param

teams.description: Only available when requested with the `?fields` param

teams_i_lead.description: Only available when requested with the `?fields` param

customslide_attributes.description: A CustomSlide is used for adding text intended for display on a screen.
customslide_attributes.title: CustomSlide

folder_attributes.description: A folder is a container used to organize multiple Service Types or other Folders.
folder_attributes.title: Folder

folderpath_attributes.description: The Folder path of a Folder
folderpath_attributes.title: FolderPath

assigned_leader_ids.description: Only available when requested with the `?fields` param

assigned_unfilled_position_ids.description: Only available when requested with the `?fields` param

custom_arrangement_sequence.description:
An array of strings containing a label and a number describing the section:

['Verse 1', 'Chorus 1', 'Verse 2']

item_type.description:
There are 4 possible values:

- `song`: The item is a song

- `header`: The item is a header

- `media`: The item is a piece of media

- `item`: The default item type

This value can only be set when an item is created. The only value that you can pass is `header`. If no value is passed then `item` will be used. To create a media item you'll attach a video media to the item, and to create a song item, you'll attach a song.

service_position.description:
There are 3 possible values:

- `pre`: the item happens before the service starts

- `post`: the item happens after the service ends

- `during`: the item happens during the service

itemassignment_attributes.description: An assignment of a person or position to a plan item.
itemassignment_attributes.title: ItemAssignment

itemnote_attributes.description:
A plan item note that belongs to a category.

Note: You can only assign the category on create. If you want to change category; delete the current note, and create a new one passing in the `item_note_category_id` then.
itemnote_attributes.title: ItemNote

itemnotecategory_attributes.description: A category of plan item notes for an entire Service Type.
itemnotecategory_attributes.title: ItemNoteCategory

key_attributes.description: Each song arrangement can have multiple keys. A key is the pitch center of the song.

alternate_keys.description:
An array of objects.

`
{
  "name": "My Alternate Key",
  "key": "B"
}
`

ending_key.description:
Possible Values:

`Ab`, `A`, `A#`, `Bb`, `B`, `C`, `C#`, `Db`, `D`, `D#`, `Eb`, `E`, `F`, `F#`, `Gb`, `G`, `G#`, `Abm`, `Am`, `A#m`, `Bbm`, `Bm`, `Cm`, `C#m`, `Dbm`, `Dm`, `D#m`, `Ebm`, `Em`, `Fm`, `F#m`, `Gbm`, `Gm`, `G#m`

To set the key to minor append `m` to the key. e.g. `Cm`

starting_key.description:
Possible Values:

`Ab`, `A`, `A#`, `Bb`, `B`, `C`, `C#`, `Db`, `D`, `D#`, `Eb`, `E`, `F`, `F#`, `Gb`, `G`, `G#`, `Abm`, `Am`, `A#m`, `Bbm`, `Bm`, `Cm`, `C#m`, `Dbm`, `Dm`, `D#m`, `Ebm`, `Em`, `Fm`, `F#m`, `Gbm`, `Gm`, `G#m`

To set the key to minor append `m` to the key. e.g. `Cm`

key_attributes.title: Key

livecontroller_attributes.description: A person who can control Services LIVE without the required permissions
livecontroller_attributes.title: LiveController

neededposition_attributes.description: An amount of unfilled positions needed within a team in a plan.
neededposition_attributes.title: NeededPosition

organization_attributes.description: The root level of an organization where account-level settings are applied.
organization_attributes.title: Organization

person_attributes.description: A person added to Planning Center Services.

facebook_id.description: DEPRECATED: this attribute will be removed in the next release and will return the string "DEPRECATED" in this version

legacy_id.description: If you've used Person.id from API v1 this attribute can be used to map from those old IDs to the new IDs used in API v2

profile_name.description: Only available when requested with the `?fields` param

signature.description: Only available when requested with the `?fields` param

person_attributes.title: Person

personteampositionassignment_attributes.description: A person's assignment to a position within a team.

preferred_weeks.description:
When `schedule_preference` is set to "Choose Weeks" then this
indicates which weeks are preferred (checked).

e.g. ['1', '3', '5'] to prefer odd numbered weeks.

schedule_preference.description:
Possible Values:
  "Unavailable"
  "Every week"
  "Every other week"
  "Every 3rd week"
  "Every 4th week"
  "Every 5th week"
  "Every 6th week"
  "Once a quarter"
  "Once a month"
  "Twice a month"
  "Three times a month"
  "Choose Weeks"

personteampositionassignment_attributes.title: PersonTeamPositionAssignment

plan_attributes.description: A single plan within a Service Type.

dates.description: The full date string representing all Service Time dates.

files_expire_at.description: A date 15 days after the last service time. ___Returns in the time zone specified in your organization's localization settings___

items_count.description: The total number of items, including regular items, songs, media, and headers, that the current user can see in the plan.

last_time_at.description: ___Returns in the time zone specified in your organization's localization settings___

permissions.description: The current user's permissions for this plan's Service Type.

public.description: True if Public Access has been enabled.

short_dates.description: The shortened date string representing all Service Time dates. Months are abbreviated, and the year is omitted.

sort_date.description: A time representing the chronological first Service Time, used to sort plan chronologically. If no Service Times exist, it uses Rehearsal Times, then Other Times, then NOW. ___Returns in the time zone specified in your organization's localization settings___

total_length.description: The total of length of all items, excluding pre-service and post-service items.

plan_attributes.title: Plan

plannote_attributes.description: A specific plan note within a single plan.
plannote_attributes.title: PlanNote

plannotecategory_attributes.description: A category of plan notes for an entire Service Type.
plannotecategory_attributes.title: PlanNoteCategory

planperson_attributes.description: A person scheduled within a specific plan.

can_accept_partial.description: If the person is scheduled to a split team where they could potentially accept 1 time and decline another.

scheduled_by_is_eligible_for_responds_to.description: Only available when requested with the `?fields` param

scheduled_by_name.description: Only available when requested with the `?fields` param

planperson_attributes.title: PlanPerson

live_ends_at.description: End time as recorded by Services LIVE.

live_starts_at.description: Start time as recorded by Services LIVE.

team_reminders.description: A Hash that maps a Team ID to a reminder value. If nothing is specified, no reminder is set for that team. A reminder value is an integer (0-7) equal to the number of days before the selected time a reminder should be sent.

time_type.description:
Possible values are:

- rehearsal

- service

- other

publicview_attributes.description: Manage options for a public plan
publicview_attributes.title: PublicView

default.description: A template provided by Planning Center

schedule_attributes.description: An instance of a PlanPerson with included data for displaying in a user's schedule

plan_visible.description: True if the scheduled Plan is visible to the scheduled Person

plan_visible_to_me.description: True if the scheduled Plan is visible to the current Person

schedule_attributes.title: Schedule

scheduledperson_attributes.description: A person already scheduled to a SignupSheet
scheduledperson_attributes.title: ScheduledPerson

series_attributes.description:
A Series can be specified for each plan to tie plans with similar messages together, even across Service Types.

*Note*: A series is not created until artwork is added from the plan.  You can use `series_title` included in `Plan` attributes to get titles for series without artwork.
series_attributes.title: Series

servicetype_attributes.description: A Service Type is a container for plans.

custom_item_types.description:
A array of hashes that maps an item title substring matcher to a color:

[{ name: "Announcements", color: "#FFFFFF" }]

Valid substring matchers are any string that could be used as an item title.

A color is the hexadecimal value of a valid color e.g. #FFFFFF
Valid colors values are #e8f6df, #e0f7ff, #e6e2fd, #ffe0e8, #ffedd1, #cfcfcf, #eaebeb, and #ffffff

standard_item_types.description:
An array of hashes that maps an item type to a color:

[{ name: "Header", color: "#FFFFFF" }]

Valid names are Header, Song, and Media.

A color is the hexadecimal value of a valid color e.g. #FFFFFF
Valid colors values are #e8f6df, #e0f7ff, #e6e2fd, #ffe0e8, #ffedd1, #cfcfcf, #eaebeb, and #ffffff

servicetype_attributes.title: ServiceType

servicetypepath_attributes.description: The Folder path of a Service Type
servicetypepath_attributes.title: ServiceTypePath

signupsheet_attributes.description: Available positions to sign up for
signupsheet_attributes.title: SignupSheet

title.description:
The name of the song.

When setting this value on a create you can pass a CCLI number and Services will fetch the song metadata for you.

songschedule_attributes.description: A upcoming schedule for a song
songschedule_attributes.title: SongSchedule

songbookstatus_attributes.description: Used to get the status of an in progress songbook action. When FINISHED, will contain the url of the songbook.
songbookstatus_attributes.title: SongbookStatus

splitteamrehearsalassignment_attributes.description: For Rehearsal/Other Times, maps a Split Team to selected Time Preference Options. For example, used to assign 8am Ushers to 7:30am call time, and 11am Ushers to 10:30am call time.

schedule_special_service_times.description: Controls if the related rehearsal/other time is assigned when a person is scheduled to a split team service time that does not match a Time Preference Option

splitteamrehearsalassignment_attributes.title: SplitTeamRehearsalAssignment

tag_attributes.description: A tag belonging to a tag group.
tag_attributes.title: Tag

team_attributes.description: A Team within a Service Type.

schedule_to.description: This determines whether a team is a split team or not.Accepted values: 1. "plan" (default) 2. "time" (designates as a split team)

team_attributes.title: Team

teamleader_attributes.description: A leader of a specific Team in a Service Type.
teamleader_attributes.title: TeamLeader

negative_tag_groups.description: If the Team is assigned via tags, these are Tags where the option "None" is specified.

tag_groups.description: If the Team is assigned via tags, these are Tags where the option "Any" is specified.

tags.description: If the Team is assigned via tags, these are specific Tags that are specified.

timepreferenceoption_attributes.description: A Service Time a person prefers to be scheduled to.

minute_of_day.description: 0 for 12:00 am, 1 for 12:01 am, 100 for 1:00 am, through 2359 for 11:59pm

timepreferenceoption_attributes.title: TimePreferenceOption

zoom_attributes.description: Describes a zoom level for an attachment

aspect_ratio.description: The aspect ratio of the device this zoom is for. It is rounded to the nearest 3 decimal places.

x_offset.description: The percentage of the document's width the zoomed document should be offset by horizontally.

y_offset.description: The percentage of the document's height the zoomed document should be offset by vertically.

zoom_level.description: The percentage of the zoom. Must be a value between 1.0 and 5.0

zoom_attributes.title: Zoom

attachable.description: Type will be the type of resource to which it is attached.

assignable.description: Can be a Person or TeamPosition.

default_responds_to.description: A relationship with id 0 will be returned when "All Team Leaders" is the default.

scopes.services: Required scope for accessing via OAuth 2

personal_access_token.description:
Provide your Personal Access Token Client ID as the HTTP Basic username
and your Secret as the HTTP Basic password.

Example header:
Authorization: Basic BASE64(client_id:secret)"
